character.name: A young field technician in
character.prompt: A young field technician in their late teens/early twenties, medium skin tone, short messy dark brown hair. Wears an olive-green work jacket covered in mismatched teal and rust-orange fabric patches with faint circuit-line stitching, over a faded denim-blue shirt. Rolled-up sleeve on right arm shows a small stitched patch of binary digits "01001". Brown leather tool belt with a pouch and a coiled gray cable hanging off it. Holds a small silver soldering-iron-shaped tool with a glowing pale cyan cursor tip. Round aviator goggles with green-tinted lenses pushed up on forehead. Brown work boots, dark blue trousers. Determined, slightly scrappy expression.
